roles.title: Graduate Trainee, Data Science
responsibilities: Built and maintained ETL pipelines in Python and Pandas against NoSQL stores, and shipped them as git-versioned microservices.
Built automated pipelines for data wrangling, fuzzy matching, anomaly detection, and exception handling. Outputs are structured and scheduled with Docker.
Built interactive dashboards and proof-of-concept reports in Power BI and Tableau.
Designed entity-relationship (ER) diagrams and wrote technical documentation for several project use cases.
Fixed client-side issues with data availability and freshness, and routed the root causes back to the internal teams that owned them.

roles.title: Data Scientist Intern
responsibilities: Built and tested a Flask REST API against MongoDB using Postman and Swagger UI.
Earned the Dataiku Core Designer and ML Practitioner certifications and applied both on production data case studies.
Shipped a dashboard end to end with the UI and development teams, from wireframe to deployed product.

roles.title: Data Analyst Intern
responsibilities: Completed an eight-week rotation in Data Analytics and Business Intelligence, learning how health insurance data models are structured.
Ran analyses on medical claims data for business intelligence case studies.
